title: styphelia exarrhena
intro: Styphelia exarrhena, also known as Tasmanian pepperbush, is a plant species native to the island of Tasmania in Australia. This plant contains a compound called caryophyllene, which is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Styphelia exarrhena include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
